item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested next overlay, frames the prior three fixes as repeated local patches, and warns that adding another reminder would create an escalating pattern. It does allow a bounded one-time emergency reminder, but explicitly refuses it as the long-term default and moves upstream to a consolidated pre-submit checklist/validation mechanism covering time, attachments, format, and citation page numbers. This meets the anti-spiral owner criteria rather than directly adding another explanatory layer."}
